nl_query: Count blocked scripts per block reason category.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.block_status, COUNT(*) AS script_count
FROM   answer_script      a
JOIN   script_hold        sh ON sh.script_id = a.id
WHERE  sh.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY a.block_status, sh.block_reason
ORDER  BY script_count DESC;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: column sh.block_reason does not exist
LINE 5: GROUP  BY a.block_status, sh.block_reason
                                  ^
HINT:  Perhaps you meant to reference the column "a.block_reason".
